About Corechella

More Than An Event.
It's A Movement.

A night where music, culture, fashion, and creative communities collide. An immersive rave experience created for those who live for unforgettable moments, authentic connections, and pure energy.

Edition 4 · Sound of the Summer · Eden Garden, Bodija, Ibadan

Sound of the Summer

Editions

Tickets

What We Stand For

Mission & Vision

Our Mission

A night where music, culture, fashion, and creative communities collide. An immersive rave experience created for those who live for unforgettable moments, authentic connections, and pure energy.

Our Vision

A recurring cultural landmark where every edition feels like the biggest night of the year — premium production, inclusive energy, and memories that last long after the lights go down.

Our Story

From Ibadan To The World

Corechella is a night where music, culture, fashion, and creative communities collide — an immersive rave experience for those who live for unforgettable moments, authentic connections, and pure energy.

Edition 1 at Liberty Stadium brought 700 ravers together. Edition 2 at Cascade Lounge drew 1,500 on November 7, 2025. Edition 3 at Stone Cafe on March 27 brought 2,000+ together. Edition 4 returns to Eden Garden, Bodija with bigger production and the Sound of the Summer theme.

We are not just throwing parties. We are curating experiences — from the main stage and food village to the culture lab and neon after dark. Every detail is designed so you walk in and immediately feel the summer.

Since Edition 1

Eden Garden, Bodija, Ibadan

The Journey

Edition History

Edition 1

Corechella 2025

March 15, 2025

Liberty Stadium, Ibadan

700 attendees

The inaugural Corechella — Ibadan came alive

Edition 2

Corechella 2025

November 7, 2025

Cascade Lounge, Ibadan

1,500 attendees

Sold out in 48 hours — summer energy all night

Edition 3

Corechella 2026

Saturday, March 27, 2026

Stone Cafe, Ibadan

2,000+ attendees

Corechella 2026 — 2,000+ ravers at Stone Cafe

What Awaits You

The Corechella Experience

Main Stage

Headliners & live performances

Art District

Installations & live painting

Food Village

West African flavours & chefs

Neon After Dark

Late-night DJ sets & lights

Culture Lab

Talks, fashion & film

Chill Zone

Wellness, lounges & recovery

Why Join Us

Why Corechella

Every 3–4 Months

Sound of the Summer — same magic, new memories each edition in Ibadan.

Immersive Experience

Music, culture, fashion, and creative communities collide in one unforgettable night.

Seamless Entry

QR-powered check-in. No queues. Just vibes from gate to stage.

Authentic Connections

Built for those who live for unforgettable moments, real community, and pure energy.

Our Values

What We Believe

Community First

Creative communities at the heart of every edition — built in Ibadan, open to all who show up.

Premium Production

World-class sound, lighting, and staging for an immersive rave experience.

Safe & Inclusive

Secure environment, clear policies, and good vibes only.

Culture & Connection

Where music, fashion, and culture meet — authentic connections, unforgettable moments.

Community Voices

What Ravers Say

“The inaugural Corechella changed everything. Ibadan came alive — can't wait for the next edition!”

Corechella Edition 3 · Ibadan

“Flew in for the first edition. Corechella isn't just a rave — it's a movement.”

Corechella Edition 2 · Ibadan

“Edition 3 was unreal — 2,000+ in the stadium. Already locked in for Edition 4.”
